urllib.parse/SplitResult/geturl.name: geturl
urllib.parse/SplitResult/geturl.description: Return the re-combined version of the original URL as a string. This may differ from the original URL in that the scheme may be normalized to lower case and empty components may be dropped. Specifically, empty parameters, queries, and fragment identifiers will be removed. For urldefrag() results, only empty fragment identifiers will be removed. For urlsplit() and urlparse() results, all noted changes will be made to the URL returned by this method. The result of this method remains unchanged ...
